SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") is made on this 1st day of November, 2023 by and between:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, and reachable at +65 9123 4567 and tanwm@example.sg.
2. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC: S3456789C), residing at 456 Marine Parade, Singapore 449876, and reachable at +65 9876 5432 and aishah.abdullah@example.sg.
3. Ramasamy Muthu (NRIC: https://example.sg/user/S4567890D), residing at 789 Telok Blangah Road, Singapore 098888.

Company: Fictional Holdings Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 200312345G), with registered office at 101 Raffles Place, Singapore 048623.

The Sellers hereby agree to sell to the Purchaser, and the Purchaser hereby agrees to purchase from the Sellers, a total of 100,000 shares of Fictional Holdings Pte. Ltd. for a purchase price of SGD 500,000 (the "Purchase Price").

This SPA does not include any provisions related to the project plan or project status updates, and those areas are intentionally left out of this agreement.
